message:
Add Gemini adapter (native Gemini API) + use local .env

Gemini adapter with complete, streaming, tool calling, tool result
round-trip. Generates synthetic call IDs (Gemini doesn't assign them).
Handles system instructions, functionCall/functionResponse parts.
Switched all tests to load from local .env instead of serf path.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
